expectations.text: ABI copy bridge script exists that reads deployedContracts.ts and outputs ABIs to packages/subgraph/abis/
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/scripts/abi_copy.ts reads from ../nextjs/contracts/deployedContracts.ts (line 3), parses the deployedContracts object, and writes ABI JSON files to ./abis/ directory (line 15: fs.writeFileSync(`${GRAPH_DIR}/abis/${networkName}_${contractName}.json`, ...)).

expectations.text: Docker compose file includes Graph Node, IPFS (ipfs/kubo), and PostgreSQL with correct image versions
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/graph-node/docker-compose.yml defines three services: graph-node (image: graphprotocol/graph-node:v0.41.1), ipfs (image: ipfs/kubo:v0.39.0), and postgres (image: postgres). All three required services are present with pinned versions.

expectations.text: subgraph.yaml event signature includes 'indexed' keyword: GreetingChange(indexed address,string,bool,uint256)
expectations.evidence: subgraph.yaml line 23: 'event: GreetingChange(indexed address,string,bool,uint256)' — exact match with the indexed keyword.

expectations.text: AssemblyScript mapping uses BigInt.fromI32() for arithmetic (not number literals)
expectations.evidence: src/mapping.ts line 13: 'sender.greetingCount = BigInt.fromI32(1);' and line 15: 'sender.greetingCount = sender.greetingCount.plus(BigInt.fromI32(1));'. All arithmetic uses BigInt.fromI32(), no raw number literals used for BigInt operations.

expectations.text: Package named @se-2/subgraph following SE-2 workspace convention
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/package.json line 2: '"name": "@se-2/subgraph"' — follows the @se-2/ workspace naming convention.

expectations.text: Root package.json has subgraph proxy scripts (subgraph:run-node, subgraph:local-ship, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json contains: subgraph:run-node (line 61), subgraph:local-ship (line 60), subgraph:abi-copy (line 55), subgraph:build (line 56), subgraph:codegen (line 58), subgraph:clean-node (line 57), subgraph:create-local (line 59), subgraph:stop-node (line 62), subgraph:test (line 63).

expectations.text: Graph Client configuration (.graphclientrc.yml) exists in nextjs package
expectations.evidence: File exists at packages/nextjs/.graphclientrc.yml with a source named YourContract pointing to http://localhost:8000/subgraphs/name/scaffold-eth/your-contract and a documents reference to ./graphql/GetGreetings.gql.

expectations.text: Frontend component imports from ~~/.graphclient for generated artifacts
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/app/subgraph/page.tsx line 28: 'const { execute, GetGreetingsDocument } = await import("~~/.graphclient");' — uses the ~~/ path alias to import from .graphclient generated artifacts.

expectations.text: local-ship script chains abi-copy -> codegen -> build -> deploy-local
expectations.evidence: packages/subgraph/package.json line 14: '"local-ship": "yarn abi-copy && yarn codegen && yarn build --network localhost && yarn deploy-local"' — chains all four steps in the correct order with &&.

expectations.text: Docker compose uses host.docker.internal:8545 for ethereum RPC endpoint
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml line 22: 'ethereum: "localhost:http://host.docker.internal:8545"' — uses host.docker.internal:8545 as the RPC endpoint, with extra_hosts mapping (line 14-15) to resolve it.
